name: Brownie Cookie (the Chewy)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Firmly packed light brown sugar
2 cups Semi-sweet chocolate chips (12 oz pkg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine Crisco, light brown sugar, water, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs to the creamed mixture and beat into it.
4. Gradually add flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt. Mix in at low speed until just blended.
5. Stir in chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake one baking sheet at a time in the oven for 375°F for 7-9 minutes, or until cookies are set. They will appear soft and moist; do not overbake.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes. Then transfer them to foil-covered countertops to cool completely.
